languages.text: "Еще утром она была в строю. Проклятье! Поговорите с {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}магосом{/g} Экзальтом-117, пусть проведет повторную проверку турелей".

traits.locale_text: "Ещё утром она была в строю. Проклятье! Поговорите с {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}магосом{/g} Экзальтом-117, пусть проведет повторную проверку турелей".

languages.text: "It was operational this morning. Damn it! Talk to {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Exalt-117, have him check the turrets again."
languages.original_text: "Еще утром она была в строю. Проклятье! Поговорите с {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}магосом{/g} Экзальтом-117, пусть проведет повторную проверку турелей".

traits.locale_text: "It was operational this morning. Damn it! Talk to {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Exalt-117, have him check the turrets again."
"It was operational this morning. Damn it! Talk to {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Exalt-117, have him check the turrets again."
"It was operational this morning. Damn it! Talk to {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Exalt-117, have him check the turrets again."

languages.text: “今早还好好的。真该死！去找{g|Encyclopedia:Magos}贤者{/g}尊使-117，让他再检查一遍炮台。”
languages.original_text: "It was operational this morning. Damn it! Talk to {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Exalt-117, have him check the turrets again."

traits.locale_text: “今早还好好的。真该死！去找{g|Encyclopedia:Magos}贤者{/g}尊使-117，让他再检查一遍炮台。”

languages.text: « Il était encore opérationnel pas plus tard que ce matin. Malédiction ! Allez voir le {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}magos{/g} Exalt-117, demandez-lui d'inspecter à nouveau les tourelles. »
languages.original_text: "It was operational this morning. Damn it! Talk to {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Exalt-117, have him check the turrets again."

traits.locale_text: « Il était encore opérationnel pas plus tard que ce matin. Malédiction ! Allez voir le {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}magos{/g} Exalt-117, demandez-lui d'inspecter à nouveau les tourelles. »

languages.text: "Bu sabah çalışıyordu. Kahretsin! {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Yüce-117 ile konuşmak gerek, taretleri tekrar kontrol etmesini söylersiniz."
languages.original_text: "It was operational this morning. Damn it! Talk to {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Exalt-117, have him check the turrets again."

traits.locale_text: "Bu sabah çalışıyordu. Kahretsin! {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Yüce-117 ile konuşmak gerek, taretleri tekrar kontrol etmesini söylersiniz."

languages.text: «Estaba operativo esta mañana. ¡Maldita sea! Hable con el {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}magos{/g} Exaltado-117 y envíele a comprobar las torretas de nuevo».
languages.original_text: "It was operational this morning. Damn it! Talk to {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Exalt-117, have him check the turrets again."

traits.locale_text: «Estaba operativo esta mañana. ¡Maldita sea! Hable con el {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}magos{/g} Exaltado-117 y envíele a comprobar las torretas de nuevo».

languages.text: "Heute Morgen hat sie noch funktioniert. Verdammt! Sprecht mit {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Exalt-117, er soll die Geschütze noch einmal überprüfen."
languages.original_text: "It was operational this morning. Damn it! Talk to {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Exalt-117, have him check the turrets again."

traits.locale_text: "Heute Morgen hat sie noch funktioniert. Verdammt! Sprecht mit {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Exalt-117, er soll die Geschütze noch einmal überprüfen."

languages.text: 「今朝は稼働していたのに。くそっ！{g|Encyclopedia:Magos}マゴス{/g}・エクサルト117に話して、砲塔をもう一度確認させろ。」
languages.original_text: "It was operational this morning. Damn it! Talk to {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Exalt-117, have him check the turrets again."

traits.locale_text: 「今朝は稼働していたのに。くそっ！{g|Encyclopedia:Magos}マゴス{/g}・エクサルト117に話して、砲塔をもう一度確認させろ。」
